use_in_wiki: Copy buttons, tab pills, sidebar nav, all interactive triggers across 11 sections
why_swap: 10 skeuomorphic button materials (glossy, glass, metal, foil, neon) vs shadcn's flat variants. Same markup, swap CSS variables. Cursor-reactive glints on Metal/Foil.
risk: Pure CSS + pointer hook, zero deps — but the visual style is bold. May clash with the wiki's neon/dark aesthetic if not themed. Test on dark surface first.

use_in_wiki: Every WikiCard in all 11 sections (200+ instances)
why_swap: For the Monetize and Ecosystem sections specifically — sparklines inside cards make data-dense surfaces feel alive. shadcn Card is fine for text; this adds motion.
risk: Only swap for data-viz cards, not text cards. Mixed card styles across sections is acceptable if scoped.

use_in_wiki: Mobile drawer, copy confirmations, combo detail expansions
why_swap: Morphing modal animates from the trigger element (card-to-modal pattern — combo #18 in the Field Guide). Premium feel for the Builder section's workflow detail view.
risk: Morphing requires shared element IDs; ensure only one modal open at a time. Test on mobile — morph can disorient on small screens.

use_in_wiki: Search bar, Builder goal input, WebAppGen fields
why_swap: The Builder section's goal input is the single most important interaction in the wiki. A gradient chat-style input signals 'AI lives here' better than a flat text field.
risk: Chat input implies conversational UX — make sure the Builder actually responds in chat-like fashion or it's misleading.

use_in_wiki: All section sub-navigation (Activate, Build, Validate, Skills, Monetize, Field Guide)
why_swap: Expandable tabs fit more labels without truncation — useful for the Activate section's 6 tabs (Master/Advocate/Mods/Tasks/Templates/Brands) on mobile.
risk: Expandable tabs add a click to reach overflow items — slower for power users. Keep for mobile-only, fall back to shadcn Tabs on desktop.

use_in_wiki: Playbook workflows (24 items), Validate lint rules (32 items)
why_swap: Bouncy spring physics on expand/collapse — feels premium for the Playbook section where users open/close workflows repeatedly.
risk: Spring physics can feel slow if over-animated. Cap duration at 300ms.

use_in_wiki: Combo scores, confidence bars, copy button hints
why_swap: Marginal upgrade — shadcn Tooltip is already solid. Only swap if you want the BeUI aesthetic consistency across the whole UI.

shadcn_import: Custom div in page.tsx (not shadcn Sidebar)
use_in_wiki: Desktop sidebar (10 section nav), mobile drawer
why_swap: Purpose-built dashboard sidebar with active-state indicators, group headers, and collapse-on-mobile. Replaces my hand-rolled nav with a battle-tested pattern.
risk: May bring its own styling that clashes with the void-black neon aesthetic. Theme override required.
